title: Anyone interested in collaborating on a monday.com app?
excerpt:

posts.author: bradfoster (Brad Foster)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking to launch a few apps in the monday.com app marketplace. I’m a software developer with ~10 years of experience, but new to the monday.com developer ecosystem.

Ideally I’d like to focus more on the business side - maybe 70% business/marketing, 30% developing with my potential partner focusing purely on development.

I’m in the US, so ideally I’m looking for someone also from the states, but not a hard requirement.

Let me know if you’re interested!
